news.title: Semester II Academic Calendar Extension Announcement
news.content: The Academic Senate has extended the Semester II schedule by one week to allow sufficient time for project presentations and continuous assessments revisions. Exams will now commence on July 14, 2026.

news.title: Zenti Annual Hackathon 2026: Registration Open
news.content: Calling all student software devs! This year's topic centers on Open Governance and Generative AI helpers. Secure your slots today. Total cash prizes aggregate KES 500,000 + sponsor tech-kits.

news.title: Internal Audit: Faculty Course Materials Submissions
news.content: All faculty members are reminded that the portal for uploading supplementary class handouts and lecture videos will close on June 22. Submission complies with regulatory compliance audits.

lecturers.name: Prof. Jane Koech
lecturers.bio: Lead Research Scientist in Machine Learning systems and Deep Neural Network processing optimizations.

lecturers.name: Dr. Evans Omwamba
lecturers.bio: Academic Dean of Mechanical & Automation Engineering faculties with an active focus on Industrial IoT instrumentation.

lecturers.bio: Lecturer of Discrete Mathematics and Applied Statistics structures with over 5 years of specialized field analysis.
